query:
INSERT INTO procurement_prices (
                id, contract_id, resource_type, unit_type,
                base_cost, currency, tier_pricing,
                effective_from, effective_until, description,
                created_at, updated_at
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                resource_type = VALUES(resource_type),
                unit_type = VALUES(unit_type),
                base_cost = VALUES(base_cost),
                currency = VALUES(currency),
                tier_pricing = VALUES(tier_pricing),
                effective_from = VALUES(effective_from),
                effective_until = VALUES(effective_until),
                description = VALUES(description),
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
